query: SELECT cp.id, cp.project_id, cp.plot_number, cp.building_category_id, cp.duration_months, cp.bua_sqft, cp.status, p.name as project_name FROM cpa_projects cp LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.project_id ORDER BY cp.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT cp.id, cp.project_id, cp.plot_number, cp.building_category_id, cp.duration_months, cp.bua_sqft, cp.status, p.name as project_name FROM cpa_projects cp LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.project_id ORDER BY cp.id;
